title: Vanilla Emissive Ores
description: Make the ore textures emissive, completely in vanilla!
body:
# Vanilla Emissive Ores ## Make the ore textures emissive, completely in vanilla!
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/vanilla-emissive-ores)

This pack utilises the new emissive block models feature from 1.21.2 to add emissive ore textures!
